@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "gitea-2908-hide-users-from-public-view", + "missionClass": "fixer", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "gitea: Hide users from public view", + "description": "Hide users from public view. Requested by 46+ users.", + "type": "feature", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Check current gitea setup", + "description": "Verify your gitea version and configuration:\n```bash\ngitea --version\n```\nThis feature requires a working gitea installation." + }, + { + "title": "Review gitea configuration", + "description": "Review the relevant gitea configuration:\n- Gitea version (or commit ref): 1.2.3\n- Git version: 2.15\n- Operating system: CentOS\n- Database (use `[x]`):\r\r\r\r\n- Can you reproduce the bug at https://try.gitea.io:\r\r\r\n- Log gist:\n\n## Description\nI think there should exist a config option to" + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for Hide users from public view", + "description": "Yeah, this would be nice to have. For now, I've just had to 403 anyone who visits ```/explore/users``` via NGINX.\n\nFWIW, looks like both the gitea and gogs community wants this.\n\nhttps://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/5080\nhttps://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/3248\n```yaml\n{{template \"base/head\" .}}\n
\n {{template \"explore/navbar\" .}}\n
\n Users not viewable.\n
\n
\n{{template \"base/footer\" .}}\n```" + }, + { + "title": "Verify the feature works", + "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the feature described in \"Hide users from public view\" is functioning correctly." + } + ], + "resolution": { + "summary": "Yeah, this would be nice to have. For now, I've just had to 403 anyone who visits ```/explore/users``` via NGINX.\n\nFWIW, looks like both the gitea and gogs community wants this.\n\nhttps://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/5080\nhttps://github.com/gogits/gogs/issues/3248", + "codeSnippets": [ + "{{template \"base/head\" .}}\n
\n {{template \"explore/navbar\" .}}\n
\n Users not viewable.\n
\n
\n{{template \"base/footer\" .}}", + "curl -X GET \"http://gitea/api/v1/users/search\" -H \"accept: application/json\"" + ] + } + }, + "metadata": { + "tags": [ + "gitea", + "community", + "git-hosting", + "feature" + ], + "cncfProjects": [ + "gitea" + ], + "targetResourceKinds": [], + "difficulty": "intermediate", + "issueTypes": [ + "feature" + ], + "maturity": "community", + "sourceUrls": { + "issue": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea/issues/2908", + "repo": "https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea" + }, + "reactions": 46, + "comments": 71, + "synthesizedBy": "copilot" + }, + "prerequisites": { + "tools": [ + "docker", + "git" + ], + "description": "A working gitea installation or development environment." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:59:30.893Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
